training_status: very active - consistent lifting splits, cardio, nutrition and recovery protocol for ~2 years

compounds.frequency: weekly (escalated to every 5 days at max dose)

benefits.description: Allows perfectly hitting macros daily without hunger; eating like a robot
Shredded physique achieved; stayed leaner when on medication
Cured ongoing IBS issues; resolved bloating and gas; able to expand food variety without IBS flare-ups
Improved sleep by reducing restlessness from carb cravings

side_effects.description: Nausea at higher doses interfered with ability to eat
High tolerance developed; each dose increment only lasted 4-6 weeks before requiring escalation; started injecting every 5 days instead of weekly

protocol_notes: Started at 2.5mg, titrated up by 2.5mg increments. Each dose effective for 4-6 weeks before tolerance required escalation. Reached 15mg after ~12 months. Also implemented diet changes based on ALCAT testing via naturopath ~2 years ago. Not prescribed; purchased online. Goal was to get shredded for 40th birthday. Height 5'9". Took 2-3 week breaks from Tirz but felt better and stayed leaner when on it.
